zAA valid traceback must be passed if no exception is being handled)
last_tracebackr
import x; x.main()c
TESTCMDr
testq
pydocZ
pagerrZ
usage: pdb.py [-c command] ... [-m module | pyfile] [arg] ...
Debug the Python program given by pyfile. Alternatively,
an executable module or package to debug can be specified using
the -m switch.
Initial commands are read from .pdbrc files in your home directory
and in the current directory, if they exist.  Commands supplied with
-c are executed after commands from .pdbrc files.
To let the script run until an exception occurs, use "-c continue".
To let the script run up to a given line X in the debugged file, use
"-c 'until X'".c
}	|	j
rT|	
mhc:r
command=r
--help)
-cz	--command)
-mTz
Error:z
does not existz*The program finished and will be restartedZ
Restartingz
with arguments:rD
z/The program exited via sys.exit(). Exit status:)
z2Uncaught exception. Entering post mortem debuggingz1Running 'cont' or 'step' will restart the programz#Post mortem debugger finished. The z
 will be restarted)
